inputs.shares_source: FY2025 weighted average basic shares 127.723M (20-F FY2025)
inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 cash from operating activities $28.6M divided by 127.7M basic shares (20-F FY2025 consolidated cash flow); excludes treasury fair-value volatility in net loss
inputs.revenue_other_source: Other revenues $158.9M FY2025 (20-F income statement, Note 6: CoinDesk, indices, data, events, subscriptions)
inputs.exchange_gross_spread_source: Digital asset sales $244.8B minus cost derecognized $244.7B = ~$78.3M gross spread FY2025 (20-F income statement, in thousands)
inputs.cash_source: Cash and equivalents $87.9M at December 31, 2025 (20-F balance sheet)
inputs.related_party_source: Borrowings due to related party SPV KY Limited $514.8M at December 31, 2025 (20-F Note 22)
inputs.normalization_note: FY2025 reported net loss $785.5M driven by fair value losses on digital assets held ($675M), finance expense on related-party debt, and admin including share-based comp. Lawrence base uses filing OCF $28.6M as owner cash proxy, not GAAP net income or crypto treasury marks.

marvin_floor.notes: FY2025 operating cash flow per share; filings only

blended_best.notes: OCF-based owner cash; no approved third-party blend

bear.notes: Crypto volume trough; CoinDesk ad weakness; related-party debt refinanced on worse terms

base.notes: Exchange spread plus CoinDesk indices/data grow with institutional crypto adoption; OCF normalized off FY2025

bull.notes: Volume share gains + CCData/CoinDesk cross-sell; treasury gains remain off-base

btc_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Crypto and exchange metrics inform stance and overlays; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

themes.label: Digital asset exchange turnover vs owner spread

indicators.label: Digital asset sales (gross turnover, USD bn)
Exchange gross spread (USD m)
indicators.source: 20-F FY2025 digital sales minus cost derecognized

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Treasury digital assets and customer safeguarded assets marked at fair value; related-party debt $514.8M not in Lawrence FCF0

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: CoinDesk Insights ad revenue cyclical; burden in admin; growth in other revenues line

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in FCF?
option_scan.evidence: Exchange and subscription revenue recognized currently

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: block.one legacy; related-party SPV debt is liability not asset

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution / legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: No dated legal recovery in base case

option_scan.question: Embedded product option in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: CoinDesk 20 index listed on Bullish Exchange (CD20/USDC-PERP cross-sell per 20-F)

stance.rationale: Pending mechanical IRR at live price
